query.en: Migrate the Figma file at {{figmaUrl}} into a {{targetStack}} component. Extract the design tokens, generate the markup, and self-critique against the design system until the score converges.
query.zh-CN: 使用这个插件完成以下任务：Migrate the Figma file at {{figmaUrl}} into a {{targetStack}} component. Extract the design tokens, generate the markup, and self-critique against the design system until the score converges.
